name: Low Fat Rocky Road Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Prepare a 9 x 13-inch pan by spraying it with cooking spray and lightly floured.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine baking powder, cocoa/carob powder, salt, and flour.
4. In another mixing bowl, beat together egg whites, sugar, vanilla, and marshmallow cream until well combined.
5. Mix the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until just combined.
6. Bake for 18 minutes.
